title: By the Law
writer: Lev Kuleshov, Jack London, Viktor Shklovskiy
actors: Aleksandra Khokhlova, Sergey Komarov, Vladimir Fogel
plot: A five-person team of gold prospectors in the Yukon has just begun to enjoy great success when one of the members snaps, and suddenly kills two of the others. The two survivors, a husband and wife, subdue the killer but are then f...
